properties.sql: WITH per_donor AS (SELECT d.c_code AS donor_code, d.c_name AS donor_name, COALESCE(d.c_country,'') AS country, COUNT(DISTINCT pf.c_programme_code) AS num_programmes, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC),0) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0), 0) AS allocated_num, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(proj.committed,0) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0), 0) AS committed_num, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(proj.expensed,0)  * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0), 0) AS expensed_num FROM app_fd_md_donor d LEFT JOIN app_fd_programme_funding pf ON pf.c_donor_code = d.c_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_programme_code = pf.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN budget_projection proj ON proj.envelope_code = env.c_code GROUP BY d.c_code, d.c_name, d.c_country) SELECT donor_code, donor_name, country, num_programmes, to_char(allocated_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_allocated, to_char(committed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_committed, to_char(expensed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_expensed, to_char(allocated_num - committed_num - expensed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_remaining, COALESCE(ROUND(((committed_num + expensed_num) * 100.0) / NULLIF(allocated_num,0), 1) || '%', '—') AS donor_used_pct FROM per_donor ORDER BY allocated_num DESC NULLS LAST, donor_code
